name: grammar-fixer
title: Grammar Fixer
description: Select any text and trigger the command to fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation in place — no copy-paste needed.
author: prathamvaidya

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: LLM Provider
preferences.description: The AI provider to use for grammar correction

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your API key for the selected provider. Not required for Ollama or Raycast Pro — enter any value as a placeholder.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model
preferences.description: Model ID to use (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-20250514, gpt-4o, gemini-2.0-flash)

preferences.name: useRaycastAI
preferences.title: Use Raycast AI
preferences.label: Use Raycast AI if available (Raycast Pro)
preferences.description: When enabled, uses Raycast's built-in AI instead of your API key if you have Raycast Pro.

preferences.name: userInstruction
preferences.title: Extra Instructions
preferences.description: Optional instructions appended to the system prompt (e.g. "Use British English" or "Keep it formal")
preferences.placeholder: e.g. Don't use em dashes. Use British English.

preferences.name: customBaseURL
preferences.title: Custom Base URL
preferences.description: Optional base URL override (useful for OpenRouter or self-hosted endpoints)

commands.name: fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar
commands.description: Fixes grammar of selected text in-place using an LLM
